title: Acknowledgement
description: An intent's judgment to accept a Finding as known/won't-fix (agency/capabilities/intent/_main.py; Spec 381 §4). SERVES the intent; ACKNOWLEDGES the analyze Finding (cross-capability edge). Unlike a Suppression it does not change scan-time scoring — it makes 'accepted debt' queryable.

risk.description: The decay-risk code being acknowledged ('R1'-'R6', 'T1'-'T6', or a custom 'Cx').

glob.description: The file glob the acknowledgement applies to (named 'glob' not 'pattern' — graphqlite reserves 'pattern').

reason.description: Why the finding is accepted as known/won't-fix — the judgment's provenance.
